summary: Onboarded TapIn (React Native/Expo BJJ class scheduling app) into the factory as project 'tapin'. Copied source from Light Orchestration/TapIn, renamed project-alpha, updated all factory metadata.
Designed and coordinated implementation of recurring weekly classes with per-occurrence override support. Routed design to Daedalus, implementation to Hephaestus and Apollo.
Coordinated date format change from YYYY-MM-DD to DD-MM-YYYY for all user-facing display and input. Internal Firestore storage kept as YYYY-MM-DD for sort order.
Configured Context7 MCP server for the factory. Created .mcp.json, updated .claude/settings.local.json with enabledMcpjsonServers and tool permissions. Requires session restart to activate.
